tools.name: public_api.catalog_search
tools.description: Search the local safe public API catalog by category, keyword, or API id.

tools.name: public_api.probe
tools.description: Verify a catalog endpoint sample URL is reachable before building automation around it.

tools.name: public_api.call
tools.description: Call a safe read-only catalog endpoint with explicit parameters.

tools.name: public_api.weather_forecast
tools.description: Get a daily weather forecast for a location and exact date range through Open-Meteo.

tools.name: public_api.recipe_search
tools.description: Find a recipe by text, ingredient, category, area, or random meal through TheMealDB.
